opening_summary: The Groww app has received a total of 1435 reviews, with 166 from the App Store and 1269 from the Play Store, between March 16, 2026, and May 11, 2026. The reviews highlight both positive and negative aspects of the app, including its ease of use, technical issues, and customer support.

top_themes.theme_name: Poor Customer Support and High Charges
top_themes.summary: Customers are experiencing difficulties with the app's customer support and are complaining about high charges and brokerage fees.
Users are experiencing technical issues with the app, including glitches, slow performance, and difficulties with trading.

top_themes.theme_name: Ease of Use and Beginner Friendliness
top_themes.summary: Users find the app easy to use and navigate, and it is suitable for beginners.

user_quotes.quote: Interface is good, Speed of placing order is good.
user_quotes.theme_name: Poor Customer Support and High Charges

user_quotes.quote: Always buy on higher price due to app fluctuation never buy on exact price
Best in the class, beginner friendly and very futuristic application..
user_quotes.theme_name: Ease of Use and Beginner Friendliness

action_ideas.action: Improve customer support by reducing wait times and increasing the number of support staff.
action_ideas.linked_theme: Poor Customer Support and High Charges

action_ideas.action: Fix technical issues by optimizing the app's performance and reducing glitches.
Enhance the app's features and functionality to meet user needs and stay competitive.

coverage_note: App Store public coverage did not reach the full requested lookback window. The stored snapshot contains the newest publicly reachable reviews only.
